changes: Guard: Effect duration reduced from 5 to 4 seconds.
Guard: Movement speed reduction decreased from 50% to 33%.
Holy Spirit: Healing potency reduced from 8,000 to 6,000.
Intervene: Recast time increased from 12 to 15 seconds.
Wind's Reply: Additional damage from the Pressure Point effect increased from 10,000 to 12,000.
Meteodrive: Range increased from 15 to 20 yalms.
Fuma Shuriken: Recast time reduced from 12 to 10 seconds.
Dokumori: Recast time increased from 20 to 24 seconds.
Dokumori: Effect duration reduced from 10 to 8 seconds.
Bunshin: Potency of additional damage reduced from 4,000 to 2,000 when using Forked Raiju or Fleeting Raiju.
Bunshin: Additional damage will no longer ignore the effects of Guard when using Assassinate.
Doton: Reduction to damage taken reduced from 20% to 15%.
Seiton Tenchu: Now ignores the effects of Guard when dealing damage.
HP: Reduced from 63,000 to 61,500.
Zanshin: Potency increased from 5,000 to 6,000.
HP: Increased from 60,000 to 61,500.
World-swallower: Movement speed increased from 25% to 50%.
Ouroboros: Damage converted into HP increased from 50% to 100%.
Powerful Shot: Reduction to the recast time of Harmonic Arrow increased from 4 to 5 seconds.
Pitch Perfect: Reduction to the recast time of Harmonic Arrow increased from 4 to 5 seconds.
Harmonic Arrow: Recast time reduced from 16 to 15 seconds.
Blast Charge: Number of Heat stacks required to grant Overheated reduced from 5 to 4.
Saber Dance: When striking multiple targets, potency changed to 12,000 for the first target and 8,000 for all remaining enemies.
Dance of the Dawn: When striking multiple targets, potency changed to 15,000 for the first target and 10,000 for all remaining enemies.
Lethargy: Reduction to target's damage dealt increased from 25% to 33%.
Lethargy: Duration of target damage reduction increased from 4 to 5 seconds.
Lethargy: Heavy effect duration reduced from 4 to 3 seconds.
Lethargy: Recast time reduced from 16 to 15 seconds.
Holy in White: Potency increased from 8,000 to 9,000.
Smudge: Recast time reduced from 16 to 12 seconds.
Tempera Grassa: Barrier potency increased from 6,000 to 8,000.
Tempera Grassa: Tempera Coat recast time is no longer reduced when the barrier is completely absorbed.

new_content.name: AAC Light-heavyweight Tier (Savage)
new_content.description: High-difficulty raid tier with removed weekly entry and reward restrictions, and treasure coffers that now always appear.

new_content.name: AAC Light-heavyweight M4
new_content.description: Raid encounter with removed weekly restriction on receiving Light-heavy Holoblades.

new_content.name: Crystalline Conflict
new_content.description: PvP mode receiving adjustments to Swift Sprint status durations in specific arenas.

new_content.name: The Palaistra
new_content.description: Crystalline Conflict arena with adjusted Swift Sprint status durations.

new_content.name: The Volcanic Heart
new_content.description: Crystalline Conflict arena with adjusted Swift Sprint status durations.

new_content.name: Equipment Enhancement
new_content.description: System for exchanging items for augmented weapons using Surgelight Solvent.

new_content.name: /photograph
new_content.description: A new text command allowing players to take out an instant camera and snap a photo.
